flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arkansas State University-Mountain Home rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.9k → $3.3k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Arkansas State University-Mountain Home fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (69.5% → 61.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arkansas State University-Mountain Home fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Arkansas State University-Mountain Home rose 90% between 2006 and 2009 (19.4% → 36.8%).
